channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: What is the legality of the US and Israeli attacks on Iran? - The Guardian
item.description:
1. What is the legality of the US and Israeli attacks on Iran?  The Guardian

  4. How the Bombing of Iran Is Affecting Lebanon, Kuwait and Other Countries  The New York Times
  5. Where things stand after the US and Israeli strikes on Iran  AP News

item.title: Live Updates: Trump won't rule out ground troops in Iran, says campaign could last 5 weeks - CBS News
item.description:

  4. Iran war live: Iran says Strait of Hormuz closed and warns it will attack ships trying to pass  Reuters

item.title: Trump’s Iran War Widens, Forcing Reluctant Allies to Choose - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. Trump’s Iran War Widens, Forcing Reluctant Allies to Choose  Bloomberg.com
